mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (sender_id, receiver_id, content, timestamp, is_read) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{timestamp}, #{isRead})
mapper.select: SELECT cm.*, u1.name as senderName, u1.email as senderEmail, u2.name as receiverName FROM chat_message cm JOIN users u1 ON cm.sender_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON cm.receiver_id = u2.id WHERE (cm.sender_id = #{user1} AND cm.receiver_id = #{user2}) OR (cm.sender_id = #{user2} AND cm.receiver_id = #{user1}) ORDER BY cm.timestamp ASC

SELECT cm.*, u.name as senderName, u.email as senderEmail FROM chat_message cm JOIN users u ON cm.sender_id = u.id WHERE cm.id IN ( SELECT MAX(id) FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id IS NOT NULL -- For simplicity, assuming receiver is always admin for now GROUP BY sender_id ) ORDER BY cm.timestamp DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET is_read = TRUE WHERE id = #{messageId}
UPDATE chat_message SET is_read = TRUE WHERE sender_id = #{senderId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = FALSE
